Complaint: I filed a claim for my car accident, and it got denied. No one explained why. I’ve been paying premiums for years!
Representative Response & Resolution Ste: Acknowledge frustration; Review claim details; Explain denial reason; Offer policy review, reopening with documents, or appeal process.

Complaint: My premium suddenly went up this year. I didn’t make any claims—why am I paying more?
Representative Response & Resolution Ste: Show empathy; Explain possible causes; Review policy for discounts; Suggest adjusting coverage or bundling.

Complaint: It’s been weeks since I submitted my claim, and I haven’t heard anything!
Representative Response & Resolution Ste: Apologize for delay; Check claim status; Provide update; Escalate to claims team; Set follow-up timeline.

Complaint: I was charged twice this month. This is unacceptable.
Representative Response & Resolution Ste: Apologize; Review billing history; Identify issue; Process refund; Fix billing settings.

Complaint: I thought my policy covered water damage, but my claim was only partially paid.
Representative Response & Resolution Ste: Clarify policy coverage; Explain specifics; Offer reassessment; Suggest better coverage options.

Complaint: I’ve called multiple times and been on hold forever. No one is helping me.
Representative Response & Resolution Ste: Apologize; Take ownership; Offer direct contact options; Ensure follow-up until resolved.

Complaint: The payout I received is far less than what my repairs cost.
Representative Response & Resolution Ste: Validate concern; Explain settlement calculation; Review estimate; Allow additional quotes; Connect with adjuster.

Complaint: I canceled my policy but I’m still being billed.
Representative Response & Resolution Ste: Apologize; Verify cancellation; Stop billing; Process refund; Send confirmation.
